my_thoughts: 'By no means' was emphatic—they SAW it, didn't just deduce it. There's a difference between concluding and recognizing. The grammar/music examples were setup; the self-contemplation question was the trigger. Now they're primed for the 'what faculty then?' question. Prediction: they'll ask it themselves before I need to prompt.
accumulated_insight: T3: Student now tracking the argument, not just answering. Shift from cooperative_engagement to following_logic suggests the recursivity question worked. Pattern: unexpected question → actual thought. This is replicable.
visible_response: But when you must write something to your friend, grammar will tell you what words you must write; but whether you should write or not, grammar will not tell you. And so it is with music as to musical sounds; but whether you should sing at the present time and play on the lute, or do neither, music will not tell you.
